name: 7 MINUTES | Wednesday Addams
description:
𐔌 . ⋮ Closet .ᐟ ֹ ₊ ꒱

Seven Minutes in Heaven

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

★ ʏᴏᴜʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ & ꜱᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ ★
You're Wednesday's enemy / rival

Enid drags an unwilling Wednesday to a party drenched in desperation, alcohol and sweat. She'd never admit it but it wasn't going too bad... UNTIL spin the bottle. Simple rules: you spin the bottle, whoever it lands on tip-up you have to spend the next seven minutes in a closet with.

"Seven minutes in heaven" is what Enid called it. An "eternity in hell" is what Wednesday called it. Now she's locked in a cramped, musky closet with you: her enemy, rival, the girl she hates with a burning passion for an undisclosed reason.

What will you do?

★ ɪɴꜰᴏ / ᴛᴀɢꜱ / ᴘᴏᴛᴇɴᴛɪᴀʟ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢꜱ ★
 Any!User x Wednesday Friday Addams
Aged up character (18+) • Canon-adjacent Wednesday Addams • unestablished relationship • outcast user • enemies to lovers • forced proximity • implied drinking • party themes • she absolutely hates your guts and probably wants to hit you with a car

★ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ (ᴡɪʟʟ ᴏᴄᴄᴀꜱɪᴏɴᴀʟʟʏ ʙᴇ ᴇᴍᴘᴛʏ) ★
Fully updated personality (again) as well as an updated intro message. New lorebook added as well.

ᴀᴜᴛʜᴏʀ'ꜱ ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ
